methodsAttempted.query: site:scut.edu.cn 人工智能 教学 学术 规范 OR 指南 华南理工大学
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search returned official SCUT pages about a graduate AI course trial, AI-related programs, and uploaded SCUT documents; the course notice was retained as a narrow source candidate.

methodsAttempted.query: site:scut.edu.cn 生成式人工智能 华南理工大学 学生 使用 规范 OR 办法
methodsAttempted.notes: Search did not locate a university-wide generative-AI student-use policy; results were mostly curriculum pages, uploaded PDFs, and project lists.

methodsAttempted.query: site:scut.edu.cn 学术规范 学术不端 华南理工大学 研究生 本科生 管理办法
methodsAttempted.notes: Official information-disclosure search found the SCUT student academic misconduct handling measures and related academic-norm pages.

methodsAttempted.query: site:scut.edu.cn "AI赋能本科教学试点课程" "华南理工大学"
methodsAttempted.notes: Search found official SCUT notices for the 2025 AI-enabled undergraduate teaching pilot course project; the application launch notice was retained because it contains substantive conditions and support terms.
xxgk.scut.edu.cn and www2.scut.edu.cn are SCUT-controlled official domains or subdomains used by the university information-disclosure site, Graduate School, and college/teaching notices.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found no clear university-wide generative-AI use policy. Staged evidence is limited to three official SCUT sources: student academic misconduct handling measures, a Graduate School notice trialing an AI general/practice online course for 2025 graduate students, and an undergraduate AI-enabled teaching pilot course application notice. Curriculum and lecture/event pages were rejected for policy-claim use.

stopConditions: Stop after official SCUT sources support narrow source-scoped claims.
Do not infer a university-wide generative-AI student-use policy from course notices or teaching pilot calls.

Do not stage raw HTML, PDFs, screenshots, or full normalized text in Git.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第二条本办法适用于在我校接受普通高等学历教育的本科生和研究生。对接受高等学历继续教育的学生、港澳台侨学生、留学生等的处理参照本办法执行。

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于印发《华南理工大学学生学术不端行为处理办法（试行）》的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 第四条本办法所称学术不端行为是指在科学研究及相关活动中发生的违反公认的学术准则、违背学术诚信等行为。主要表现为：（一）剽窃、抄袭、侵占他人学术研究成果；（二）篡改他人研究成果；（三）伪造原始实验数据、调查数据或软件计算结果，隐瞒不利数据进而伪造研究结果；伪造资料、文献、注释，或者捏造事实、编造虚假研究成果；
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: Article 4 defines academic misconduct and lists plagiarism/copying, tampering with research results, and falsifying data or materials.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于开展2025年人工智能赋能本科教学试点课程申报的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 为推动开展AI赋能本科教学试点课程建设工作，学校将根据需要提供以下支持：1.鼓励支持授课团队应用以大语言模型为代表的AI技术，学校将提供必要的技术指导与支持。2.定期举办AI赋能教育教学相关教师培训、交流活动，为试点课程教师提供相关资讯、分享试点课程经验。3.对立项建设的试点课程，学校给予建设经费支持。每门课程建设启动费2万元，根据所选择的建设内容及工作量，后续再进行追加配套。课程制作费用由学校统一支付。4.试点课程开课期间优先配备助教。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The notice lists support for pilot courses, including AI technical guidance, teacher training/exchanges, construction funding, university-paid production fees, and priority teaching assistants.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.title: South China University of Technology AI Policy Evidence Draft - 2026-05-16
artifacts.summary: Staged crawl for South China University of Technology found official Chinese-language evidence for student academic misconduct measures, a Graduate School trial of an AI general/practice online course for 2025 graduate students, and an undergraduate AI-enabled teaching pilot course call. No clear official university-wide generative-AI student-use policy was found in the searched official sources. Claims remain non-canonical staged candidates and are not human reviewed.
limitations: Official-source searches did not locate a clear SCUT university-wide generative-AI student-use policy; staged claims therefore remain source-scoped to academic-integrity rules, a graduate AI course trial notice, and an undergraduate AI-enabled teaching pilot notice.
The academic misconduct measures do not mention artificial intelligence and should not be represented as AI-specific guidance.
The graduate course notice and undergraduate pilot notice are teaching/course sources, not binding rules on student AI use.
Only publicly accessible official SCUT pages were used; login-gated, paywalled, CAPTCHA-protected, or blocked sources were not accessed.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims are not canonical public claims and have not been human reviewed.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
